subdomain.description: Dribl Match Centre subdomain (e.g. 'fv' for Football Victoria, 'fsa' for Football SA).

club.description: Dribl club ID (from the ?club= URL param). Optional; combine with teamFilter to narrow.

season.description: Dribl season ID (from the ?season= URL param).

competition.description: Dribl competition ID (from the ?competition= URL param). Optional; if omitted, all competitions for the club in that season are included.

league.description: Dribl league ID (from the ?league= URL param). Optional; some associations use league as an additional filter level above competition.

teamFilter.description: Optional case-insensitive substring matched against the team's grade/name to narrow to one specific team (e.g. 'U13 Boys'). Empty string disables.

timezone.description: IANA timezone the kickoff times should be presented in (e.g. 'Australia/Melbourne').

matchDurationMinutes.description: Default event length when Dribl doesn't expose a finish time.

outputPath.description: Where to write the generated .ics file, relative to repo root.
